## NamespacedWiringData type

Namespaced type safe which allows the access to the State, the Getters, the payload and metadata of a [XStoreModule](./x-components.xstoremodule.md)<!-- -->.

<b>Signature:</b>

```typescript
export declare type NamespacedWiringData<ModuleName extends XModuleName> = StoreModuleStateAndGetters<ModuleName> & {
    eventPayload: ExtractPayload<ModuleName>;
    metadata: WireMetadata;
};
```
<b>References:</b> [XModuleName](./x-components.xmodulename.md)<!-- -->, [StoreModuleStateAndGetters](./x-components.storemodulestateandgetters.md)<!-- -->, [ExtractPayload](./x-components.extractpayload.md)<!-- -->, [WireMetadata](./x-components.wiremetadata.md)
